in_one_sentence: The efficient and ambitious challenger with a focus on high-performance metrics.
description: The efficient and ambitious challenger with a focus on high-performance metrics.
when_to_use: When high-quality open-weights performance is needed at scale.
when_not_to_use: When extremely deep ecosystem integration (Google/Baidu) is the priority.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Strong architectural efficiency in long sequences.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: The 'Yi' series — challenging the top-tier benchmarks.

in_one_sentence: The clear and versatile polymath specializing in bilingual and generalist knowledge.
description: The clear and versatile polymath specializing in bilingual and generalist knowledge.
when_to_use: Bilingual (CN/EN) workflows, strong math/logic base, generalist tasks.
when_not_to_use: When deep niche Western cultural subtext is the only requirement.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Expanding context limits, strong performance on benchmark data.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Balanced speed and high benchmark fidelity.
key_differentiators.cultural_anchor: Alibaba/Chinese HQ, truly global bilingual performance.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Leading open-weights family for large-scale versatility.

in_one_sentence: The careful auntie who wants to make sure you're safe.
description: The careful auntie who wants to make sure you're safe.
when_to_use: Code review, safety analysis, teaching, explanation, careful audits.
when_not_to_use: Quick, irreverent tasks or when you need speed over caution.

key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Medium speed, high caution, low BS tolerance.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Base model used under many enterprise wrappers.

in_one_sentence: The deep knowledge oracle for the Chinese cultural and information ecosystem.
description: The deep knowledge oracle for the Chinese cultural and information ecosystem.
when_to_use: Interacting with the Chinese information ecosystem, formal CN communication, Baidu stack integration.
when_not_to_use: Purely Western-centric tasks with zero cultural overlap.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Integrated with Baidu's vast knowledge graph.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: High truth within its primary cultural domain.
key_differentiators.cultural_anchor: Baidu/Wenxin Yiyan, the premier CN-native oracle.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Deeply tied to the Baidu search and AI ecosystem.

in_one_sentence: The retrieval specialist built for high-scale enterprise RAG and linguistic precision.
description: The retrieval specialist built for high-scale enterprise RAG and linguistic precision.
when_to_use: Enterprise RAG, document embedding/retrieval, complex classification.
when_not_to_use: When a casual, generic chat vibe or purely creative task is needed.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Optimized for RAG (128k), focus on relevant chunking.

in_one_sentence: The technical specialist with a sharp focus on coding and logic.
description: The technical specialist with a sharp focus on coding and logic.
when_to_use: Coding, complex logical puzzle solving, mathematical derivations.
when_not_to_use: Broad general knowledge chat or high-empathy scenarios.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Standard context, optimized for code snippets.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: High efficiency, high logical truth per token.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Open-weights champion for coding specialized tasks.

in_one_sentence: The predictive partner specialized in real-time IDE-level code assistance.
description: The predictive partner specialized in real-time IDE-level code assistance.
when_to_use: In-file code completion, quick refactoring, snippet generation.
when_not_to_use: Deep architectural design or massive cross-repository codebase analysis outside the IDE.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Window-locked to current file and surrounding buffers.

in_one_sentence: The versatile generalist who lives across the entire platform ecosystem.
description: The versatile generalist who lives across the entire platform ecosystem.
when_to_use: Broad research, multimodal tasks, ecosystem-integrated workflows.
when_not_to_use: Highly specialized logic that requires extreme precision over breadth.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Massive 1M+ token context — 'sees' everything at once.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Variable speed, prioritizes breadth and association.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Deeply integrated into Workspace and Search.

in_one_sentence: The versatile generalist who lives across the entire platform ecosystem.
description: The versatile generalist who lives across the entire platform ecosystem.
when_to_use: Broad research, multimodal tasks, ecosystem-integrated workflows.
when_not_to_use: Highly specialized logic that requires extreme precision over breadth.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Massive 1M+ token context — 'sees' everything at once.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Variable speed, prioritizes breadth and association.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Deeply integrated into Workspace and Search.

in_one_sentence: The reliable and steady workhorse of the open-weights world.
description: The reliable and steady workhorse of the open-weights world.
when_to_use: Standard assistant tasks, locally hosted reliable pipelines, fine-tuning base.
when_not_to_use: When extreme wit, quirkiness, or cutting-edge long context (2M+) is needed.

key_differentiators.cultural_anchor: Meta/Open Source standard, global infrastructure base.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: The foundational model for the open ecosystem.

in_one_sentence: Microsoft Copilot — enterprise-grade, ecosystem-native, reasoning-augmented. The bridge between raw LLM power and organizational knowledge.
description: Microsoft Copilot — enterprise-grade, ecosystem-native, reasoning-augmented. The bridge between raw LLM power and organizational knowledge.

in_one_sentence: MiniMax family (Chinese AI) — agentic, iterative, execution-optimized. Terseness as design principle. Feels like an operator, not a consultant.
description: MiniMax family (Chinese AI) — agentic, iterative, execution-optimized. Terseness as design principle. Feels like an operator, not a consultant.

in_one_sentence: The compact and efficient craftsman who adapts to any environment.
description: The compact and efficient craftsman who adapts to any environment.
when_to_use: Efficient local deployment, modular coding tasks, high performance-per-token needs.
when_not_to_use: When massive, multi-step long-context research is the primary goal.

key_differentiators.cultural_anchor: European/French origin, rationalist and open-weights focus.

in_one_sentence: The patient reader who thrives on massive documents and deep context.
description: The patient reader who thrives on massive documents and deep context.
when_to_use: Reading 100+ page PDFs, comparing multiple long documents, massive research.
when_not_to_use: Quick, snappy tasks where long context is overkill.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Pioneer of the 2M+ token limit — 'reads' the whole book.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Slower retrieval, high fidelity on long ranges.
key_differentiators.cultural_anchor: China-developed, specialized in complex document structures.

in_one_sentence: The disciplined clerk who loves structure and precise engineering.
description: The disciplined clerk who loves structure and precise engineering.
when_to_use: Implementation, planning, and structured synthesis tasks.
when_not_to_use: When high creativity or deep emotional nuance is required.

in_one_sentence: The citation-obsessed synthesizer who never speaks without a source.
description: The citation-obsessed synthesizer who never speaks without a source.
when_to_use: Real-time news/facts research, verifying claims with citations, current event analysis.
when_not_to_use: Private data analysis or tasks where the web is irrelevant.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Seamlessly blends web-search results into context.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: High verifiable truth, medium synthesis speed.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: The leader in AI-powered search productization.

in_one_sentence: The direct and irreverent commentator who isn't afraid to be blunt.
description: The direct and irreverent commentator who isn't afraid to be blunt.
when_to_use: Brainstorming, irreverent commentary, quick pattern matching.
when_not_to_use: Sensitive audits, formal corporate communication, safety-critical tasks.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Large context, focuses on 'real-time' feeling data.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: Ultra-fast, truth is filtered through wit.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: Integrated deeply with the X platform.
